历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 7137 → 10084 → 12966 (Undergraduate Batch 1 Section B) → 24935 (Undergraduate Batch 1 Section B) → 9043. In 2023–2024, due to the inclusion of Undergraduate Batch 1 Section B (Sino-foreign cooperation/special types), rankings shifted significantly backward. In 2025, returning to the main code, the baseline was approximately 9043, with the main code rankings fluctuating between 9000–10000 in recent years. The enrollment plan for this university in Inner Mongolia for science (physics category) was 97 from 2021 to 2023, increased to 107 in 2024, and 109 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 117, an expansion of about 7.3% compared to 2025, which is significant and helps alleviate competition to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 57th, up 6 places from 2025 (63rd), reflecting steady improvement in comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to candidates. In 2024, the reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed, involving an investigation into teacher ethics but not triggering large-scale negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranked 7th (high heat), with significant exposure on short video platforms; recommendation videos by education bloggers like Zhang Xuefeng further boosted attention, leading to high application enthusiasm. No obvious record of enrollment gaps; Chemical Engineering and Technology rated A, Chemistry and Materials Science and Engineering rated A-, with a total of 3 A- and above disciplines, showing significant disciplinary advantages in chemical engineering and materials, highly corresponding to the university's engineering experimental classes (Green Chemical Engineering and Biomedicine, Advanced Materials and Green Chemistry) and other enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular engineering majors such as Computer Science and Automation continue to have high social heat. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam registrants in Inner Mongolia is about 154,000, a significant increase of about 32% from 2025 (approximately 116,360). Based on recent proportions, it is estimated that physics category candidates are about 110,880, an increase of about 32.4% from 2025 (83,716), significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying overall competition. Beijing University of Chemical Technology is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal to Inner Mongolian candidates. The university's enrollment in Inner Mongolia for science accounts for a large proportion (109 in 2025), making it an important source province outside the region.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 9043, an enrollment expansion of about 7.3% in 2026 (alleviating competition), a rise in Soft Science rankings (enhancing attractiveness), high Douyin heat (increased attention), and a significant increase of about 32% in Inner Mongolian candidate numbers (intensifying competition), the expansion and candidate growth offset each other, but the candidate growth far exceeds the expansion rate, leading to an overall tightening of competition. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will be approximately 9501, with a range of 9001–10001.

- Engineering Experimental Class (Bio-manufacturing Advanced Class).

- Science Experimental Class (Green Chemistry)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Advanced Materials).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 9001–10001, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 9000), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 majors like Hongde Academy and Computer Science. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 10000), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
